summary: US Monthly/yearly subscriber - ESPN - W2W modal
description:
GIVEN a user has MLBALL entitlement
AND a plain ESPN game is live

**NOTE:**
National TV game = -FOX Saturday Baseball or ESPN Sunday Night Baseball-   ESPN, Netflix, NBC/Peacock Sunday Night Baseball

Seeing doc for specifics : [https://support.mlb.com/s/article/MLB-TV-Game-Availability?language=en_US|https://support.mlb.com/s/article/MLB-TV-Game-Availability?language=en_US|smart-link]

steps.action: WHEN user clicks on game tile or hero
steps.result: THEN a blackout message displays in the W2W picker
